title: Separate SFX/Music Volume Controls
summary: Replace the single volume slider with two independent sliders for SFX and Music. All SFX methods currently use this.masterVolume — migrate them to this._sfxVol. Music pad and ambient already use this._musicVol. Add quick-mute icons per category, audio preview on adjustment, and set sensible defaults (SFX 40%, Music 20%).

tasks.description: Replace single volume slider in index.html with two sliders: 🔊 SFX and 🎵 Music, each with a quick-mute icon
acceptance_criteria: Two separate slider rows visible in gameplay status bar
Each row has an icon (🔊 for SFX, 🎵 for Music), a slider 0-100, and a mute/unmute icon click
Old single volume-slider and volume-icon are replaced

tasks.description: Style the dual volume controls in CSS — compact layout that fits the status bar
acceptance_criteria: Volume controls stack vertically with minimal spacing
Each slider is 60px wide with green thumb matching existing style
Quick-mute icons are clickable with cursor:pointer
Light mode support for slider colors
Mobile: controls don't overflow status bar

tasks.description: Migrate ALL SFX methods in audio.js from this.masterVolume to this._sfxVol
acceptance_criteria: playGatePlace uses this._sfxVol
playClick uses this._sfxVol
playWireConnect uses this._sfxVol
playWireDisconnect uses this._sfxVol
playSimPulsePass/Fail uses this._sfxVol
playSuccess uses this._sfxVol
playFail uses this._sfxVol
playButtonClick uses this._sfxVol
playStarReveal uses this._sfxVol
playAchievement uses this._sfxVol
playInvalidConnection uses this._sfxVol
playHoverTick uses this._sfxVol
playTransitionWhoosh uses this._sfxVol
playUndo/Redo uses this._sfxVol
playPinHover uses this._sfxVol
playMuteOff/On uses this._sfxVol
playDeleteKey uses this._sfxVol
playEscapeCancel uses this._sfxVol
playToolboxHover uses this._sfxVol
playMicroCelebration uses this._sfxVol
startWireProximity/updateWireProximity uses this._sfxVol
_playNoiseBurst continues to take explicit volume param (caller passes _sfxVol-based value)

tasks.description: Update audio.js defaults: SFX 40%, Music 20%. Stop setMasterVolume from syncing both.
acceptance_criteria: Default sfxVolume = 0.4, musicVolume = 0.2
setMasterVolume no longer exists or is deprecated — replaced by individual setters
setSfxVolume and setMusicVolume work independently
localStorage saves and loads both volumes independently

tasks.description: Rewire main.js setupMuteButton() → setupVolumeControls() with dual slider logic
acceptance_criteria: SFX slider drives audio.setSfxVolume()
Music slider drives audio.setMusicVolume()
SFX mute icon toggles SFX between 0 and previous value
Music mute icon toggles Music between 0 and previous value
Initial slider positions reflect stored volumes
Volume icons update dynamically based on levels

tasks.description: Add volume controls to level select settings as well (in addition to gameplay status bar)
acceptance_criteria: Settings section on level select has SFX and Music sliders
Changes on level select propagate to gameplay sliders and vice versa

tasks.description: Add audio preview: brief sound plays when SFX slider is adjusted; brief tone when music slider is adjusted
acceptance_criteria: Moving SFX slider plays a short click/blip at the new volume level
Moving Music slider plays a brief pad tone at the new volume
Preview is debounced (doesn't fire on every pixel of slider movement)

tasks.description: Ensure volume changes apply immediately to currently-playing ambient/music sounds
acceptance_criteria: Changing music volume while ambient is active smoothly ramps the ambient gain
Changing music volume while pad is active smoothly ramps the pad gain
Already handled in setMusicVolume — verify it works with new slider wiring

tasks.description: Volume normalization: auto-reduce SFX during loud simulation sequences
acceptance_criteria: During row-by-row simulation (>4 rapid pulses), SFX gain is reduced by 30%
After simulation ends, SFX gain returns to normal

tasks.description: Update service worker cache version to bust stale assets
acceptance_criteria: Cache version bumped in sw.js
Script tags in index.html have updated cache-bust param

testing_focus: SFX slider independently controls all gameplay sounds
Music slider independently controls ambient + pad
Mute icons work as toggles for each category
Level select volume mirrors gameplay volume
Existing audio behaviors unchanged (pitch escalation, stereo pan, etc.)
Mobile layout doesn't break with dual sliders
rollback_criteria: If any audio is completely broken or UI layout breaks, revert all changes
